mapper.insert: INSERT INTO SESSION_QUESTION ( SESSION_ID, REF_ID, QUESTION_TEXT, SOURCE_TYPE, CATEGORY_ID, QUESTION_ORDER, DIFFICULTY, QUESTION_INTENT, QUESTION_KEYWORDS, CREATED_AT, CREATED_BY, UPDATED_AT, UPDATED_BY ) VALUES ( #{sessionId}, #{refId}, #{questionText}, #{sourceType}, #{categoryId}, #{questionOrder}, #{difficulty}, #{questionIntent}, #{questionKeywords, typeHandler=com.algotalk.interviewservice.util.JsonListTypeHandler}, NOW(), #{userId}, NOW(), #{userId} )
mapper.select: SELECT SESSION_QUESTION_ID, SESSION_ID, QUESTION_TEXT, SOURCE_TYPE, QUESTION_ORDER, DIFFICULTY, QUESTION_INTENT, QUESTION_KEYWORDS FROM SESSION_QUESTION WHERE SESSION_ID = #{sessionId} ORDER BY QUESTION_ORDER ASC
